sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92195" key="r(a/sdon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥάσδον</orth>, or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥάπ-ος</orth>, name of an ingredient of nard, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:130" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.130</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">132</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
